description: Replay of the hosted Gemini smoke failure where survivalPacket.packet.student_support leaked a non-roster alias, plus narrative text that referenced the same off-roster student.

routines.description: Students unpack, complete attendance, and review the visual agenda.

student_support.key_strategies: Amira settles best when another student is already regulated and the instructions are chunked aloud.
student_support.things_to_avoid: Do not overload the first task with extra written directions.

student_support.key_strategies: This entry should be removed because Ari is not on the classroom roster.

ea_coordination.schedule_summary: Arrives before recess and supports literacy through lunch.
ea_coordination.if_ea_absent: Use the sentence-frame bin and keep partner work optional.

simplified_day_plan.sub_instructions: Model the example once, then send students out with the sentence-frame tray.

family_comms.notes: Teacher plans to follow up if writing stamina remains low.
This alias should be removed because it belongs to another classroom.

complexity_peaks.reason: Post-lunch reset can take longer after gym days.
complexity_peaks.mitigation: Start with a calm read-aloud before independent work.

heads_up: Ari may ask about the unfinished workbook page from yesterday.
Keep transition language short before numeracy.
